title: More Dupe Items
description: Like the Smithing Templates, you can now dupe more items using reasonable recipes!
body:
This mod adds more "duplication recipes," similar to that of the Smithing Templates. For example, using one elytra and 6 phantom membranes, you can create another elytra. Most of the recipes don't change progression at all, and are intended for convenience for late-game players who don't want to go get more of some random item.

There are recipes for: Elytra, Totem of Undying, Bedrock*, Blackstone, Deepslate, Cobblestone, Dirt, Dragon Egg, Dragon Head, Elytra, Gold Ores, Gravel, The 3 Froglights, Netherrack, most Sculk blocks, Sniffer Eggs, Tridents and Wither Roses.
